vllm.title: Add "About" Heading to README.md
vllm.author: blueceiling
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add About heading to clearly distinguish the "Latest News" from the basic info listed below it.
The heading contains all the content from "vLLM is a fast and easy-to-use library..." to "Install vLLM with pip or from source:"

vllm.title: [BUGFIX] Do not return ignored sentences twice in async llm engine
vllm.author: zhuohan123
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Previously, vLLM would return the ignored sequence twice in the async llm engine. This PR fixes the issue and simplifies the code a little bit.
